name: Rod of Lordly Might
description: This rod has a flanged head, and it functions as a magic Mace that grants a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with it. The rod has properties associated with six different buttons that are set in a row along the haft. It has three other properties as well.

buttons.name: Fiery Blade
buttons.effect: Fiery blade sprouts from opposite end
buttons.light: Bright Light 40 feet, Dim Light additional 40 feet

buttons.name: Battle Axe
buttons.effect: Flanged head folds, crescent blades spring out

buttons.name: Spear
buttons.effect: Flanged head folds, spear point springs out, handle extends

buttons.name: Climbing Pole
buttons.effect: Rod transforms into climbing pole up to 50 feet long
buttons.anchoring: Spike at bottom and three hooks at top in granite
buttons.rungs: Horizontal bars 3 inches long, 1 foot apart forming ladder

buttons.name: Battering Ram
buttons.effect: Rod transforms into handheld battering ram
buttons.bonus: +10 to Strength (Athletics) checks to break barriers

buttons.name: Normal Form
buttons.effect: Rod assumes or remains normal form
buttons.depth_knowledge: Knowledge of approximate depth below ground or height above

on_failure.healing: Regain Hit Points equal to half Necrotic damage
